channel.title: Comments on: “Beer America” The Series
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In reply to <a href="https://beeramerica.tv/beer-america-the-series/comment-page-1/#comment-2112">Michael Torchia</a>.
Hi Michael, unfortunately it hasn't been picked up yet, but we are still hopeful. Programmers are still a little skidish about beer, so its taking a little time before they come around. We're hoping sooner rather then later. Thanks for the comment and watching!
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Michael Torchia.

Hi Michael, unfortunately it hasn’t been picked up yet, but we are still hopeful. Programmers are still a little skidish about beer, so its taking a little time before they come around. We’re hoping sooner rather then later. Thanks for the comment and watching!

item.title: By: Michael Torchia
item.dc:creator: Michael Torchia
item.description: Great job guys. Are you currently on a television station?
item.content:encoded: Great job guys. Are you currently on a television station?

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description: AWESOME. Nothing left to say. Thanks.

item.title: By: March & April Update | Brew Trip
item.dc:creator: March & April Update | Brew Trip
item.description: [...] around the corner. For a little taste, check out this link to the pilot for their new videos “Beer America” The Series. If you haven’t been on Brew Trip in a few weeks (shame on you!), log on and you’ll [...]
item.content:encoded: […] around the corner.  For a little taste, check out this link to the pilot for their new videos “Beer America” The Series.  If you haven’t been on Brew Trip in a few weeks (shame on you!), log on and you’ll […]

item.title: By: Craft Beer’s Place on Network Television » Myrtle Beach Beer Lovers
item.dc:creator: Craft Beer’s Place on Network Television » Myrtle Beach Beer Lovers
item.description: [...] “Beer America“ An eight-part series featuring six breweries in six different regions of the U.S. all working to create the next beer that might win big at the Great American Beer Festival in 2012. [...]
item.content:encoded: […] “Beer America“ An eight-part series featuring six breweries in six different regions of the U.S. all working to create the next beer that might win big at the Great American Beer Festival in 2012. […]

item.title: By: Scooter
item.dc:creator: Scooter
item.description: I would watch this show religiously, and I wouldn't be the only one.
item.content:encoded: I would watch this show religiously, and I wouldn’t be the only one.
